name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
benefit: Crop insurance at very low premium — Kharif: 2%, Rabi: 1.5%, Commercial: 5% of sum insured
benefit_hindi: Fasal bima bahut sasti dar par — Kharif: 2%, Rabi: 1.5%, naqdi faslon ke liye: 5%

eligibility.description: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
eligibility.description_hindi: Notified fasal ugaane waale sabhi kisan (apni ya kirade ki zameen par)
criteria: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
Both landowner and tenant/sharecropper farmers eligible
Mandatory for loanee farmers (those with crop loans)

documents_required: Crop loss claim: photos and panchnama from revenue department

steps: Visit bank where crop loan is taken
Submit land records and sowing certificate
Pay premium (2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi)
In case of crop loss: inform insurance company within 72 hours
steps_hindi: Jis bank se loan lia hai wahaan jaayein
Ya CSC center mein apply karein
Zameen ke papers aur buvai certificate dein
Fasal kharab ho toh 72 ghante mein insurance company ko bataayein

hindi_summary: Fasal Bima Yojana mein fasal ka insurance hota hai bahut saste mein. Kharif fasal ke liye sirf 2% aur Rabi ke liye 1.5% premium lagta hai. Agar baad, sukha, ya bimari se fasal kharab ho toh nuksan ka paisa milta hai. Bank ya CSC mein apply karein.
